title: Tool/Guide Bloat Verification — Resolving Phase 31.1 vs 32.4 Contradiction
phase_31_1_claim: No noindex URLs found in sitemap samples
phase_32_4_claim: 353 tools + guides are noindexed and create 53.8% sitemap bloat
resolution: Phase 31.1 was CORRECT. Phase 32.4 was WRONG.

evidence.are_353_tool_guide_urls_in_sitemap: YES — 225 tools + 125 guides + 3 geo = 353 URLs in sitemap
evidence.are_they_actually_noindexed: NO — 0 of 15 sampled tools/guides show noindex. Sitemap filter (isFormulaVariant) correctly excludes noindexed formula variants (compound-100k-20yr-5pct, mortgage-200k-15yr-5-5pct, loan-30k-5yr-6pct, etc.)
evidence.were_they_included_before_or_after_sitem: BEFORE — The 275-URL sitemap (pre-Phase 32.3A) already included these tools and guides. Phase 32.3A ADDED 6 Phase 32 URLs + some blog/comparison pages that were missing. The jump from 275→656 was primarily from SSG rebuilding with fresh data, not from adding new tool/guide pages.
evidence.are_they_valuable_indexable_pages_or_noi: INDEXABLE but THIN — All 353 are indexable (index,follow, self-canonical, HTTP 200). They are pre-calculated financial scenarios and 'how to use' guides. Legitimate pages but thin.
evidence.are_they_causing_sitemap_bloat: YES in VALUE sense — 353 thin pages dilute sitemap quality. NO in TECHNICAL sense — no noindex pollution.
evidence.should_they_remain: HOLD_FOR_REVIEW — Guides (125) are the most questionable. Tools (225) are pre-calculated scenarios that some users may find useful. A quality-based pruning (removing thin/low-value pages) could reduce bloat without removing technically valid pages.

root_cause_of_misdiagnosis: Phase 32.4 assumed the 353 tools/guides were the same as the noindexed formula variants seen in curl samples. But curl samples targeted URLs NOT in the sitemap (compound-100k-20yr-5pct, mortgage-200k-15yr-5-5pct). The sitemap filter works — it excludes those. The tools IN the sitemap are different (investment-1k-5yr pattern) and are indexable.
verdict: PHASE_31_1_CONFIRMED — No noindex pollution in sitemap. Phase 32.4 sitemap bloat claim was a misdiagnosis based on incorrect category grouping.
